metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Fernridge to break the spell.

key_dungeons.name: Ashen Barrow
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Ashen Barrow. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Ashen Barrow and find the Gold Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.

key_dungeons.name: Twisted Grotto
key_dungeons.description: A spiral staircase carved from bedrock descends into Twisted Grotto. The temperature drops with every step.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Twisted Grotto for the hidden Ivory Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.

key_dungeons.name: Rotting Labyrinth
key_dungeons.description: A rusted iron gate bars the path into Rotting Labyrinth. It swings open with a tortured groan at your touch.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Rotting Labyrinth for the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
